---
name: Model Support Request
about: Request support for a new model or runtime
title: '[MODEL] '
labels: model-support
assignees: ''
---

## Model Information

- **Model name**: [e.g., Llama 3.2 3B]
- **Model source**: [e.g., Hugging Face, local GGUF]
- **Format**: [e.g., SafeTensors, GGUF, ONNX]

## Runtime

- **Desired runtime**: [e.g., llama.cpp, vLLM, transformers]
- **Current support**: [Does it partially work? Any errors?]

## Use Case

Describe why you need this model and how you plan to use it.

## Additional Context

Links to model, documentation, or relevant information.
